docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRESNER, BRAD
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HUEY, LILY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MANI SHEIK. PLAINTIFF BRAD PRESNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LILY HUEY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRESNER, BRAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUEY, LILY $9,072.40 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,187.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,896.45 FILED BY PRESNER, BRAD AS TO DEFENDANT HUEY, LILY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JUN-06-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUEY, LILY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF NOV-01-2017
